  • Class
    Description
    ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor
    Evaluates compatibility of a set of production chemicals with each other and with the produced fluid / equipment material.
    ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor.Verdict
    Overall verdict for a compatibility study.
    ChemicalInteractionRule
    Encodes a single rule of chemical interaction or chemical / fluid / material incompatibility.
    ChemicalInteractionRule.Severity
    Severity classification of a chemical interaction.
    ProductionChemical
    Represents a production chemical used in oil and gas operations.
    ProductionChemical.ChemicalType
    Functional category of a production chemical.
    ProductionChemical.IonicNature
    Ionic nature of the active ingredient.
